_comment: 역할 초상화 동물화(수인) v2. 각 종별 해부학 어휘(beak/talons/hooves/shell/webbed)를 앵커로 사용해 늑대 편향을 차단. style_prefix에서 werewolf-consistent 문구 제거. docs/역할 동물화 비주얼 제안서.md 참고.
style_prefix: Taisho Roman art nouveau illustration, Japanese yokai kemono anthropomorphic character design, fully animal head with species-specific anatomy, humanoid body wearing Taisho-era Japanese attire (kimono, haori, or western-eclectic vest), expressive eyes natural to the species, ornate decorative frame border with cherry blossoms and vines, dark fantasy aesthetic, vertical portrait composition,
style_suffix: , art nouveau ornamental details, sakura petals, moonlit atmosphere, muted indigo and silver palette, masterpiece, best quality
